requirements.task_name: Register for the earliest weekday evening food pantry volunteer shift within 5 miles of ZIP 30301 next month
requirements.task_description: Find a food pantry volunteer opportunity scheduled on a weekday evening within the next calendar month, located within 5 miles of ZIP code 30301, and complete registration for the earliest available shift.

requirements.task_name: Sign up for a free in-person financial coaching workshop at the Downtown Campus on a Saturday morning this month
requirements.task_description: Locate a free, in-person financial coaching workshop happening at the Downtown Campus on a Saturday morning within the current month, and complete a single-person registration for that event.

requirements.task_name: Make a one-time $40 donation split as $25 to Youth Outreach and $15 to Local Food Pantry
requirements.task_description: Use the giving form to create a one-time donation totaling exactly $40, allocating $25 to the 'Youth Outreach' fund and $15 to the 'Local Food Pantry' fund, and submit the payment details.

requirements.task_name: Create a 3-event evening outreach plan across 3 different campuses within the next 60 days
requirements.task_description: Within the outreach events, select three evening events happening within the next 60 days, ensuring each event is at a different campus, add all three to 'My outreach plan', and then open the plan.

required_variables.set_condition: After successfully retrieving or creating the outreach plan (i.e., once getMyOutreachPlan has prepared its return object without error), set this flag.
required_variables.reason: This records that the user has actually opened 'My outreach plan' at least once. Combined with existing outreach_plan_items and events data, this allows the evaluator to confirm both that the required three qualifying events were added and that the user viewed the plan, satisfying all parts of the task.

requirements.task_name: Request information from a Wednesday food pantry offering fresh produce and open after 3:00 PM
requirements.task_description: Find a food pantry resource that is open on Wednesdays after 3:00 PM and offers fresh produce, then use its phone number in a contact form to request more information about that specific location.

requirements.task_name: Subscribe to the weekly email devotional for ages 18–35 with topics 'Community service' and 'Spiritual growth'
requirements.task_description: Sign up for a weekly email devotional targeted to the 18–35 age group, selecting only the 'Community service' and 'Spiritual growth' topics, and submit the subscription form.

requirements.task_name: Submit a private family-related prayer request scheduled for the upcoming Sunday
requirements.task_description: Use the prayer request form to submit a request about family and relationships, set it to be visible only to the pastoral team, and schedule it for the next upcoming Sunday.

requirements.task_name: RSVP for the earliest neighborhood cleanup next month on a Saturday morning within 10 miles of ZIP 44101 and bring 2 guests
requirements.task_description: Find a neighborhood cleanup event scheduled for a Saturday morning in the next calendar month within 10 miles of ZIP code 44101, with a light activity level, and complete an RSVP indicating you will bring 2 guests.
